missions.name: The Silent Shaft
missions.description: Marcus has been quieter than usual since you talked through your father's report. He asked you to meet him at Section 3 of the Breakstone mining levels. Old workings. The custodian there, a man named Sten, keeps the story of the place. Marcus said: bring time. He did not say what for.
missions.hint: Meet Marcus at the Deep Shafts at Breakstone. Section 3.

objectives.description: Visit the Deep Shafts at Breakstone
